results.title: Myanmar Junta Forces Displaced Karenni Civilians to Return to Unsafe Conflict Zones
results.description: The military junta is actively pressuring thousands of internally displaced persons (IDPs) from Karenni (Kayah) State who are currently sheltering in southern Shan State to return home, threatening to permanently confiscate their land and property if they refuse, local sources report.

results.title: AI chatbots are at risk of spreading government restrictions on online speech, a new study finds
results.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Ask Claude to make a pamphlet critical of President Donald Trump or Britain's King Charles III, and Anthropic's chatbot would oblige...

results.title: Malilong: Menmen
results.description: Judge Meinrado Paredes was an outstanding member of the Bench. He was fair, straight and level-headed. He was not unreasonably strict

results.title: Uttar Pradesh: Azam Khan’s Jauhar University given 15-day deadline to demolish 38 out of 40 buildings on the campus
results.description: The Rampur Development Authority has given a 15-day ultimatum to Azam Khan’s Jauhar University to demolish 38 campus buildings constructed without approved plans.

results.title: Grupo Aeroportuario Del Pacifico (NYSE:PAC) Posts Earnings Results, Misses Expectations By $0.30 EPS
results.description: Grupo Aeroportuario Del Pacifico (NYSE:PAC – Get Free Report) posted its earnings results on Tuesday. The transportation company reported $2.80 earnings per share for the quarter, missing the consensus estimate of $3.10 by ($0.30), Zacks reports. The firm had revenue of $645.23 million during the quarter, compared to analysts’ expectations of $732.26 million. Grupo Aeroportuario [...]

results.title: Former N.J. city official says he was forced out after uncovering ‘red flags’ about his new boss
results.description: The suit alleges violations of New Jersey's Law Against Discrimination and claims the city amended a health benefits ordinance specifically to deny coverage to Douglas H. Johnson and his autistic son.
